name: Brisket with Peppercorns
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the brisket in soy sauce and water for 24 hours.
2. Before cooking, rinse the brisket in water and blot dry.
3. Spread cracked peppercorns on a counter.
4. Oil one side of the brisket and press the oiled side onto the peppercorns. Ensure the peppercorns completely coat one side of the brisket.
5. Place the brisket on a broiler pan with the peppercorn side up.
6. Broil for 10 minutes to char the peppercorns.
7. Lower the rack and roast the brisket at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes (rare) to 20 minutes (medium rare).
8. Allow the brisket to cool.
9. Serve thinly sliced at room temperature.
